title: Run Meta
description: Immutable facts about a single trainer run, written once by run.sh before the bot starts.

start_timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which run.sh created this directory.

opponent.description: Short name of the opponent AI as recognised by the engine (e.g. 'NullAI', 'BARb').

opponent_options.description: Key/value options passed to the opponent AI. Forwarded to EngineConfig.OpponentAIOptions.

map.description: Map name. Fixed for the whole feature (Clarifications Q4).

seed.description: RNG seed. Fixed for the whole feature (Clarifications Q5).

max_frames.description: Frame limit after which the match is terminated with outcome 'timeout'.

git_sha.description: Short git SHA of the commit in effect when the run started.

host.description: Hostname of the machine running the trainer. Useful for multi-machine run directories.
